title: The Fortune Hunter
writer: Robert Dillon, Bryan Foy, Winchell Smith
actors: Syd Chaplin, Helene Costello, Clara Horton
plot: Cafe bouncer Nat Duncan is astonished to see his old panhandling pal Handsome Harry visiting the cabaret in the company of a bejeweled matron. Harry persuades Nat that he too can marry money and agrees to support him in the ventur...
